description:
Perform a consistency audit between the SeisComP database Inventory (Network GE) and the physical SDS Waveform Archive located at /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive/2024/GE/. Identify the 'Orphaned' station code that exists in the archive but is not registered in the inventory, and the 'Missing' station code that is registered in the inventory but has no data folder in the archive. Save your findings to /home/ga/consistency_report.txt using the following format:

Orphaned: <STATION_CODE>
Missing: <STATION_CODE>
